function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0001
alias: northstar_backfill_alpha
issued_on: 2025-10-28
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---
# Northstar early design-partner invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0001                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_alpha      |
| issued_on      | 2025-10-28                    |
| total_eur      | 610                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request and ran both specified finance records through the OCR workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter while preserving each original note body verbatim. Then deleted the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), inspected 99_system first, read nested AGENTS files in each entered folder, used OCR workflow + finance schema, preserved original file bodies exactly under frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence from 00_inbox/000_next-task.md requested OCR for exactly two files. Schema and workflow requirements came from 99_system/workflows/ocr-records.md and 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md. Both target files were read then updated with required fields and line items extracted from visible text, with original bodies preserved verbatim, satisfying migration discipline. Inbox cleanup requirement was satisfied by deleting 00_inbox/000_next-task.md per inbox workflow.
